title: Wave1 视觉底色:新增 CLI-local B-横线/C-圆点 header 原语 + 去 OUTPUT 区 `│` 竖墙 + note/log/intro/outro/error 平铺
description: Lay the global flat base. Add a NEW CLI-output-only header primitive (B-横线 = title + dim `──────` rule; C-圆点 = `● group`) in packages/cli/src/tui/structure.ts (NOT the shared theme.ts sectionBar). Remove the output-side `│`/`| ` left wall from theme-clack.ts buildNote and from ConsoleOutputRenderer's error block (buildErrorBlock/leftBar) — replace with plain indent + blank-line grouping. Flatten buildIntro to the new B-横线, buildOutro/buildLog stay one-line painted. The clack PROMPT controls and their native `│` gutter are untouched (C-006).
action: In tui/structure.ts add `export function headerRule(title: string): string` returning `<accent-bold title>\n<muted '──────' (40×'─', '-' in NO_COLOR)>` and `export function groupDot(label: string): string` returning `<accent '●'> <label>` (ASCII fallback `* <label>`). In theme-clack.ts: buildNote drops the `barPrefix` (`│ `/`| `) and renders each body line as `  <line>` (two-space indent, no gutter); buildIntro switches from `sectionBar(title)` to the new headerRule(title) (drop the duplicate rule it already appends). In ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts: buildErrorBlock drops leftBar — render header via headerRule(`[err] <title>`), then indented message / `💡 hint` / `↳ stack` lines with NO `│`; delete the now-unused leftBar() helper.

criteria: structure.ts exports `headerRule` and `groupDot` (grep 'export function headerRule' AND 'export function groupDot' in packages/cli/src/tui/structure.ts)
headerRule returns a title line + a dim rule built from '─' (and '-' under NO_COLOR); grep '──────' OR ".repeat(" near headerRule confirms the rule line
theme-clack.ts buildNote NO LONGER contains the literal `│ ` gutter prefix (grep -F '│ ' packages/cli/src/install/theme-clack.ts returns no match inside buildNote)
ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts no longer defines `leftBar` (grep 'function leftBar' returns no match) and buildErrorBlock contains no `│` literal
[UI-observable] running an install that hits an error shows the error block with NO leading `│`/`|` column — header is a B-横线, body lines are plain-indented
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test exits 0 (existing theme-clack / ConsoleOutputRenderer / NO_COLOR snapshot tests updated to the gutter-free output)
convergence.verification: cd packages/cli && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test; then run `NO_COLOR=1 node` against the build* exports to eyeball gutter-free note + B-横线 intro.
convergence.definition_of_done: All Fabric self-drawn context output (note/log/intro/outro/error) renders gutter-free with the new B-横线 header primitive; clack prompt controls and their native `│` are untouched; the shared theme.ts sectionBar/PALETTE/symbol are NOT modified.

files.change: Add headerRule(title): accent-bold title + newline + muted '─'×40 rule ('-' under NO_COLOR). Add groupDot(label): accent '●' + space + label ('* ' ASCII fallback). Both consume colors.ts paint + isColorEnabled, matching the tree/grid degradation pattern.

buildNote: remove barPrefix `│ `/`| `, render body lines as two-space-indented plain text (optional title via the new headerRule). buildIntro: replace sectionBar(title)+manual rule with headerRule(title) (single source of the rule).
Replace the sectionBar header + leftBar-prefixed block with headerRule(`[err] <title>`) + plain-indented message / 💡 hint / ↳ stack lines (no `│`). Delete the unused leftBar() helper.

implementation: Add headerRule + groupDot to tui/structure.ts (import paint, isColorEnabled from ../colors.js already present).
Rewrite buildNote in theme-clack.ts to drop the gutter; switch buildIntro to headerRule.
Rewrite buildErrorBlock in ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts to use headerRule + plain indent; remove leftBar.
Update the NO_COLOR snapshot / unit tests (theme-clack, ConsoleOutputRenderer, structure) to the new gutter-free expected strings.
Run tsc --noEmit + the cli test suite.

reference.pattern: tui/structure.ts tree()/grid() — CLI-local primitive with paint + NO_COLOR fallback; theme-clack buildIntro pure-builder-then-thin-writer

rationale.chosen_approach: A NEW CLI-local primitive (not shared sectionBar) keeps the parity-locked theme.ts/lib/theme.cjs mirror and the SessionStart hook surface untouched while delivering the flat header look in CLI output.
decision_factors: SessionStart hook consumes the shared theme
spec §0.4 deletes `▌` only in CLI output
rationale.tradeoffs: Two header primitives temporarily coexist (shared sectionBar for hooks, CLI headerRule for output) — acceptable per the parity constraint.

risks: Existing NO_COLOR snapshot tests pin the old `│`/`▌` output and will fail until updated — they MUST be regenerated, not skipped.
